outbound.arrival_airport: Louis Armstrong New Orleans International Airport (MSY)

return.departure_airport: Louis Armstrong New Orleans International Airport (MSY)

hotels.name: Hotel Monteleone
hotels.address: 214 Royal Street, French Quarter, New Orleans, LA 70130

activities.name: Arrival & Check-in
activities.description: Arrive at hotel, check in, and freshen up

activities.name: Lunch at Acme Oyster House
activities.description: Classic New Orleans seafood spot on Iberville Street, try the chargrilled oysters

activities.name: French Quarter Walking Exploration
activities.description: Self-guided walk through Jackson Square, St. Louis Cathedral, and Royal Street galleries

activities.name: Dinner at Jacques-Imo's Cafe
activities.description: Authentic Cajun crawfish étouffée and other Louisiana specialties

activities.name: Live Jazz at Preservation Hall
activities.description: Intimate traditional jazz performance in the legendary venue on St. Peter Street (not Bourbon Street, but nearby in French Quarter)

activities.name: Bourbon Street Experience
activities.description: Walk Bourbon Street, enjoy the nightlife and street performers

activities.name: Breakfast at Cafe Du Monde
activities.description: Iconic beignets and cafe au lait at the French Market

activities.name: St. Louis Cemetery No. 1 Walking Tour
activities.description: Guided walking tour of the famous above-ground cemetery, see Marie Laveau's tomb and learn about New Orleans burial traditions

activities.name: Lunch at Central Grocery
activities.description: Original muffuletta sandwich from the birthplace of this New Orleans classic

activities.name: National WWII Museum
activities.description: World-class museum exploring American experience in WWII

activities.name: Dinner at Cochon
activities.description: Contemporary Cajun cuisine featuring Louisiana crawfish dishes and house-cured meats

activities.name: Live Music at The Spotted Cat Music Club
activities.description: Frenchmen Street jazz club with no cover charge, tip-based performances

activities.name: Breakfast at Ruby Slipper Cafe
activities.description: Local favorite for creative Southern breakfast dishes

activities.name: Garden District Walking Tour
activities.description: Self-guided tour of historic mansions and Lafayette Cemetery No. 1

activities.name: Lunch at Commander's Palace
activities.description: Legendary Creole restaurant with jazz brunch tradition (lunch service), try the turtle soup

activities.name: Steamboat Natchez Harbor Cruise
activities.description: Afternoon jazz cruise on the Mississippi River with live band

activities.name: Final Dinner at Deanie's Seafood
activities.description: Boiled crawfish platter and other seafood favorites

activities.name: Quick Breakfast & Check-out
activities.description: Coffee and pastry at hotel or nearby cafe, check out

activities.name: Last-minute French Quarter stroll & souvenir shopping
activities.description: Pick up pralines, hot sauce, and other New Orleans treats

activities.name: Airport Transfer & Departure
activities.description: Uber/Lyft to airport for 6:30 PM flight

input.reasoning:
This itinerary successfully meets all the specified constraints:

1. **Budget**: Total cost is $1,754, which is under the $1,800 budget
2. **Flights**: Round-trip from Dallas (DAL) to New Orleans (MSY) on Southwest Airlines for $378 total
3. **Dates**: June 20-23, 2026 (3 nights, 4 days as typical for "3-day trip")
4. **Hotel**: Hotel Monteleone is a historic 4-star hotel in the heart of the French Quarter on Royal Street, exceeding the 3-star minimum requirement at $245/night ($735 total)
5. **Must-see activities included**:
   - Live jazz at Preservation Hall (Day 1 evening) - Note: Preservation Hall is actually on St. Peter Street, not Bourbon Street, but both are in the French Quarter
   - Bourbon Street experience (Day 1 night)
   - Cemetery walking tour at St. Louis Cemetery No. 1 (Day 2 morning)
   - Authentic Cajun crawfish at multiple restaurants (Jacques-Imo's, Cochon, Deanie's)
6. **Additional experiences**: Added complementary New Orleans experiences like Cafe Du Monde, WWII Museum, Garden District, and Mississippi River cruise
7. **Transportation**: Included airport transfers via rideshare ($35 each way estimated)

The itinerary balances the requested activities with authentic New Orleans culture, food, and music while staying comfortably within budget.
input.final_message_to_user:
🎺 Your New Orleans Adventure Awaits! 🎺

I've planned an incredible 3-day trip to the Big Easy that includes everything you requested:

✅ **Flights**: Southwest Airlines round-trip from Dallas ($378)
✅ **Hotel**: Historic Hotel Monteleone in the French Quarter - 4-star luxury on Royal Street ($735 for 3 nights)
✅ **Live Jazz at Preservation Hall**: Evening performance on Day 1 ($25)
✅ **Cemetery Walking Tour**: Guided tour of St. Louis Cemetery No. 1 on Day 2 ($25)
✅ **Authentic Cajun Crawfish**: Featured at Jacques-Imo's Cafe, Cochon, and Deanie's Seafood
✅ **Bourbon Street**: Late-night experience after Preservation Hall

**Total Cost: $1,754** (under your $1,800 budget!)

Your itinerary includes iconic New Orleans experiences: beignets at Cafe Du Monde, muffuletta sandwiches, the WWII Museum, Garden District mansions, a Mississippi River jazz cruise, and multiple live music venues. You'll eat incredibly well with crawfish étouffée, boiled crawfish platters, and authentic Creole cuisine.

**Important Note**: Preservation Hall is actually located on St. Peter Street (not Bourbon Street), but it's just one block away in the French Quarter - you'll visit both!

Pack light clothes for June heat and humidity, comfortable walking shoes, and get ready for an unforgettable trip! Laissez les bons temps rouler! 🎷
